_comment: Exact terrain footprints: a 30-man Infantry squad is ordered straight down the lane just west of the impassable hill (RUN gait via triple right-click, single far destination so any detour would be the pathfield's own). The routed footprint used to be the hill's 64-wu routing cells -- this lane sat inside the inflated column, so the squad would veer west around empty grass. Footprints are exact now, and the margin is the unit's own corner-man half-diagonal plus a body radius (~39 wu for this squad), which this lane clears: the squad marches dead straight, its east flank passing less than a metre off the drawn hillside. Drill mode (no enemy), static camera on the hill's west lane. Deterministic (scenario + seed + scripted input).
